description: Verify baseline - ensure existing tests pass and build succeeds before making changes
steps: Run 'go mod download' to ensure all dependencies are available
Run 'go test ./...' to confirm all existing tests pass
Run 'GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o k3os .' to confirm build succeeds
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass with 'go test ./...'
Build succeeds with 'GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o k3os .'
findings: All existing tests pass (10 packages with tests, 12 packages without test files). Build succeeds with GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0. go vet clean. No pre-existing failures.
